dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 1098 : To reauthorize the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works

form.official-title: To reauthorize the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994.

section.header: Reauthorization of Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994

subsection.text: Section 5 of the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994 (16 U.S.C. 719b–1) is amended—

paragraph.text: by inserting and after Guam,; and
by striking , and any other territory or possession after Virgin Islands.

subsection.text: Section 6 of the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program Act of 1994 (16 U.S.C. 719c) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking 2006 through 2010 and inserting 2025 through 2031; and
by adding at the end the following:

subsection.text: Funds authorized under subsection (a) may, as provided in appropriations Acts, only come from within amounts authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary to carry out the duties of the Federal Duck Stamp Office.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives December 15, 2025.
